text:
Sure!

Once upon a time deep in the heart of a vast forest there lived a wise old owl. The owl had seen many things and learned many valuable lessons. One night, as moonlight softly glided through the towering branches, the owl opened its immense eyes.

"Hmm," it mused, pondering the wisdom gathered from thousands of twinkling stars. "Life is ephemeral – like the fluttery leaves rustling on ancient oak branches."

With that thought, the owl turned its penetrating gaze downwards, finding a tiny frog sitting on a dewdrop. "How artfully you dance!" the owl exclaimed in feathery wonderment. "You glide gracefully from leaf to leaf. How do you find your way?"

The frog looked up, wide-eyed, "Oh, silly old owl, I just hop along the gentle stream, landing on mossy banks!"

"You could learn from that, dear," the owl whispered, offering guidance. "Remember, in life, like in the water
